questions.question: What is Shikshanam?
questions.answer: Shikshanam is an online platform dedicated to preserving and sharing ancient Indian wisdom, including Sanskrit language, philosophy, meditation, and traditional knowledge systems.

questions.question: Who can use Shikshanam?
questions.answer: Shikshanam is open to anyone interested in learning about ancient Indian wisdom, regardless of their background, age, or prior knowledge. Our courses are designed for beginners to advanced learners.

questions.question: Is there free content available?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer free introductory courses and resources. You can explore our platform and access basic content without any cost.

questions.question: How do I create an account?
questions.answer: Click the 'Sign Up' button on our homepage, enter your email address and create a password. You'll receive a confirmation email to verify your account.

questions.question: I forgot my password. What should I do?
questions.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email address, and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

questions.question: How do I change my email address?
questions.answer: Go to your account settings, click on 'Email', and follow the instructions to update your email address. You'll need to verify the new email address.

questions.question: How do I access my courses?
questions.answer: After logging in, go to 'My Courses' in your dashboard. All enrolled courses will be listed there with direct access links.

questions.question: How do I track my learning progress?
questions.answer: Your progress is automatically saved and displayed in your course dashboard. You can see completed lessons, current position, and overall progress.

questions.question: Do I get certificates for completing courses?
questions.answer: Yes, we provide certificates of completion for all paid courses. Certificates are available for download from your course dashboard after completion.

questions.question: Videos are not playing. What should I do?
questions.answer: Try refreshing the page, clearing your browser cache, or switching to a different browser. Ensure you have a stable internet connection.

questions.question: Can I access courses on mobile devices?
questions.answer: Yes, our platform is mobile-responsive and works on smartphones and tablets. We also have a mobile app available for download.

questions.question: Which browsers are supported?
questions.answer: We support Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. For the best experience, we recommend using the latest version of Chrome or Firefox.

issues.title: Login Problems
solutions: Check your email and password for typos
Clear your browser cache and cookies
Check if Caps Lock is on

issues.title: Video Playback Issues
solutions: Update your browser to the latest version

issues.title: Payment Problems
solutions: Check with your bank for any restrictions
Contact our support team for assistance

feedback.title: Feedback & Suggestions
feedback.subtitle: Help us improve our platform
feedback.content: We value your feedback! If you have suggestions for improving our platform or encounter any issues, please let us know. Your input helps us make Shikshanam better for everyone.
